label: Prohibited AI practices and AI literacy
Governance rules and general-purpose AI model obligations
Transparency rules and remaining baseline AI Act obligations
summary: Transparency obligations and the main non-high-risk remainder still apply from 2 August 2026.

label: Certain high-risk AI systems in Annex III areas
summary: Following the Commission's AI Omnibus political agreement, certain high-risk areas now shift to 2 December 2027.

label: High-risk AI systems embedded in regulated products
summary: Product-embedded high-risk systems keep the later 2 August 2028 application date.
